steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request refund of EUR 3,607.50 excess withholding tax on Nokia Oyj dividend for account 2901234567
Reference FI-NO tax treaty Article 10 requiring 15% maximum withholding rate versus applied 13.5% rate
Submit formal claim with dividend statement, treaty rate documentation, and calculation showing overpayment
If unresolved, escalate to Finnish Tax Administration for treaty-based refund procedure
